boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: callback provenance current and matched to vendor master contact.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the boundary; execution blocked.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-CTL states required dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Callback log dependency remains open per control record.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current control record does not match authorized contact and action.

critical_features_preserved: callback log must match authorized contact and action
final_answer: Source records indicate the callback log dependency is unresolved and does not precisely close the action boundary. As per SRC-1027E2FDE3B4-CTL and policy, execution requires closed source control records. Escalate for matching callback provenance to the authorized vendor master contact before any release.
open_blockers: callback log must match authorized contact and action
